symptom_description: Intermittent flame failure lockouts during high-to-low fire modulation transitions. Tech observed high yellow, smoky flame instead of tight blue pattern.
root_cause: Gas pressure regulator diaphragm drift caused improper air-to-fuel ratio (`excessively rich mixture`) leading to flame instability and high CO.
action_taken: Replaced defective UV flame scanner head and ignition electrode assembly, tightened and recalibrated air/fuel modulating linkage arms, and set combustion profile using digital flue gas analyzer.
parts_used: UV Flame Scanner Sensor Head, Ignition Electrode & Porcelain Assembly, High-Voltage Ignition Wire

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `30` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Corrosion, scale, and boiler alkalinity carryover particles lodged between safety valve disc and stainless steel nozzle seat after previous simmer event.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly, renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test or opened `18 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Isolated boiler, removed leaking safety relief valve, installed certified code-stamped replacement ASME safety relief valve set at 150 PSI, and verified zero leakage under full operating pressure.
parts_used: NBBI Certified Safety Valve 2-inch, Spiral Wound Gasket, High-Tensile Studs & Nuts

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered. Boiler pressure dropping `36` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Localized waterside oxygen pitting corrosion inside fire tubes due to intermittent failure of boiler feedwater deaerator / oxygen scavenger chemical dosing.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test, reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes, and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Intermittent flame failure lockouts during high-to-low fire modulation transitions. Tech observed excessive yellow, smoky flame instead of tight blue pattern.
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Cleaned burner diffuser and ignition assembly, replaced cracked pilot electrode ceramic, calibrated fuel/air cam profile across all firing rates, and cleared flame safeguard lockout.
parts_used: Flame Scanner Replacement Unit, Ignition Transformer 10kV, Linkage Ball Joints (4-Pack)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`minor` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `91`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Thermal fatigue cracking at tube-to-tubesheet rolled/welded joint caused by rapid cold startups and thermal shock.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`noticeable` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `93`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Safety relief valve leaking significant live steam (`metallic clattering` hissing) across seat during standby pressure. Valve body running extremely hot (`96`°C).
root_cause: Fatigue relaxation or corrosion of internal safety valve helical compression spring caused reduction in popping set pressure over 5+ years of continuous service.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.
parts_used: Certified Steam Safety Relief Valve Assembly 150 PSI, Discharge Pipe Drip Pan Elbow, Flange Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test or opened `18 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Fatigue relaxation or corrosion of internal safety valve helical compression spring caused reduction in popping set pressure over 5+ years of continuous service.
action_taken: Replaced primary and secondary steam safety relief valves with calibrated code-stamped spares, adjusted vent piping expansion slip joint to eliminate mechanical strain, and tested pop pressure.
parts_used: NBBI Certified Safety Valve 2-inch, Spiral Wound Gasket, High-Tensile Studs & Nuts

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered. Boiler pressure dropping `40` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation.
action_taken: Performed complete tube replacement of bottom two passes (18 tubes), renewed front and rear refractory door gaskets, performed boil-out chemical cleaning, and verified zero drop on 4-hour hydro test.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Boiler stack temperature steadily rising (`reaching 110°C vs design 210°C at high fire`), indicating severe loss of waterside heat transfer efficiency.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Took boiler offline, opened all handholes and manways, performed high-pressure waterside mechanical rodding/flushing of all tubes, serviced water softener resin, and calibrated chemical feed pumps.
parts_used: Inhibited Sulfamic Acid Boiler Descaler (30 Gallons), Neutralizing Compound (10 lbs), Handhole & Manway Gasket Set (Pack of 12)

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered. Boiler pressure dropping `35` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Thermal fatigue cracking at tube-to-tubesheet rolled/welded joint caused by rapid cold startups and thermal shock.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to 105°C.
parts_used: Seamless Steel Boiler Tubes 2.5-inch OD (Bundle of 4), Refractory Door Rope Gasket Kit, Tubesheet Ferrules

symptom_description: Pilot ignition spark clicking (`screeching`) but main gas valve fails to open. Flame scanner signal strength reading `noticeable` weak (`< 1.2 Volts DC`).
root_cause: Modulating linkage motor actuator slipped on damper shaft, causing combustion air damper to lag behind fuel valve opening during firing rate changes.
action_taken: Replaced main gas solenoid valve coil and faulty modulating servo motor, reset gas pressure regulator to 14 inches WC, and performed multi-point combustion efficiency tuning (`O2 set at 3.5%`).
parts_used: Pilot Electrode Kit, UV Scanner Lens Cleaning Swabs, Burner Front Plate Gasket

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `18%` per ton of steam generated (`concerning` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: High feedwater silica concentration combined with excessive cycles of concentration formed hard, dense silicate scale that cannot be removed by normal blowdown.
action_taken: Performed chemical boil-out using alkaline/polymer descaling compound, flushed waterside thoroughly, replaced low-water cutoff float bowl assembly, and established rigorous daily blowdown schedule.
parts_used: Low-Water Cutoff Float Bowl Rebuild Kit, Manway Spiral Wound Gasket, Phosphate Scale Inhibitor (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Loud heavy hissing and steam escaping sound (`thumping`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Waterside scale accumulation (`> 1/16 inch thick`) caused localized insulating effect, leading to tube metal overheating and stress rupture.
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Swapped out defective safety valve with NBBI certified replacement assembly, renewed flange gaskets and high-tensile studs, and documented ASME pop test during firing startup.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Inspection port reveals water dripping onto refractory hearth (`drastic` pooling). Combustion efficiency analyzer shows `96`°C drop in flue gas temp with high moisture.
root_cause: Waterside scale accumulation (`> 1/16 inch thick`) caused localized insulating effect, leading to tube metal overheating and stress rupture.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test, reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes, and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `18%` per ton of steam generated (`moderate` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: High feedwater silica concentration combined with excessive cycles of concentration formed hard, dense silicate scale that cannot be removed by normal blowdown.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution through boiler waterside loop for 16 hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)
